forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidTokenBanner: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.successToast: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.

auth.resetTokenInvalid: Reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordSameAsCurrent: New password must differ from your current password.
auth.mfaCodeInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.mfaNoPendingEnrolment: MFA setup session expired. Please start over.
auth.mfaSessionInvalid: Your two-factor session has expired. Please sign in again.

mfaChallenge.title: Two-factor authentication
mfaChallenge.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

auth.accountInactive: Your account has been deactivated. Contact an administrator.
auth.refreshTokenInvalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.description: Add a second layer of security to your account.

modal.step1Instructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy), or enter the key manually.
modal.step2Instructions: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
modal.step3Instructions: Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each code can only be used once if you lose your authenticator.
modal.backupCodesNote: These codes will not be shown again.
modal.confirmSavedLabel: I have saved my backup codes in a safe place

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: Track schema changes and record-level mutations across all provisioned designers.
audit.schemaDesc: DDL operations applied to each designer's provisioned table. Open the Component Library, select a designer, then view its Audit Log tab.
audit.mutationDesc: Record-level create, update, soft-delete, and restore operations. Navigate to any active menu item's data entry view to access its mutation audit log.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who has access to the platform.
users.passwordHelp: A welcome email with this password will be sent to the new user.
users.emailConflict: A user with this email already exists.
users.selfDeactivationError: You cannot deactivate your own account.
users.emailWarning: Welcome email could not be sent. Share credentials manually.
users.newPasswordLabel: New password (leave blank to keep current)
users.userNotFoundError: This user no longer exists. Refresh the list.
users.saveError: Could not save changes. Please try again.
users.roleAssignError: Could not update roles. Please try again.
users.resetMfaDialogBody: This will disable two-factor authentication, revoke all active sessions, and delete all backup codes for this user. They will need to re-enrol to use MFA again.
users.resetMfaSuccess: MFA has been reset. The user will be signed out of all sessions.
users.resetMfaError: Could not reset MFA. Please try again.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Manage access control roles and their per-resource permissions.
roles.roleNotFoundError: This role no longer exists. Refresh the list.
roles.nameConflict: A role with this name already exists.
roles.nameFormat: Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only (must start with a letter; no leading/trailing hyphen).
roles.nameNoConsecutiveHyphens: Role name cannot contain consecutive hyphens.
roles.hasAssignments: This role has active user assignments and cannot be deleted.
roles.saveError: Could not save changes. Please try again.
roles.deleteError: Could not delete role. Please try again.
roles.matrixHelp: Grant this role CRUD access to specific Designers. Each row is one Designer — tick a column to allow the role to perform that action on records in that Designer's table. Platform-admin gets full access regardless.
roles.matrixEmptyState: No resources defined yet. Resources appear here when Menu Bindings are created.
roles.datasetManagementHelp: Allow this role to create, edit, and delete Datasets.

menus.title: Menus
menus.subtitle: Configure the platform navigation structure
menus.noMenus: No menu items yet. Create the first one.
menus.noMatches: No menu items match your filters.
menus.notFoundError: This menu item no longer exists
menus.hasChildren: Remove sub-menu items first before deleting this menu item
menus.nameMaxLength: Name must be 200 characters or less
menus.orderHelp: Items with the same order appear in creation order. Gaps are permitted.
menus.sectionHeaderNote: This item has no Designer binding — it will appear as a section header in the navbar.
menus.isActiveHelp: Inactive items are hidden from the navbar for all users
menus.parentNotFound: Parent menu item no longer exists
menus.maxDepthExceeded: Menu items can only be nested one level deep
menus.uploadInvalid: File must be PNG or JPG and under 2 MB
menus.iconNoMatch: No matching icons in the common set. Use the manual input below for any Lucide name.
menus.rolesHelp: Users must have at least one of these roles to see this menu item. An empty list hides it from all users.
menus.rolesNotFound: One or more selected roles no longer exist
menus.rolesEmptyWarning: This will hide the menu item from all users. Click Save again within 3 seconds to confirm.
menus.rolesCatalogCapped: Showing the first 100 roles. To add a role beyond this set, manage it in the Roles admin first.
menus.assignmentConflict: Another change to this menu's roles happened at the same time. Reload and try again.
menus.reorderInstructions: Drag rows to reorder. Sub-menu items stay within their parent. Press Space on a focused row to pick it up, arrows to move, Space again to drop, Escape to cancel.
menus.reorderMenusNotFound: One or more menu items no longer exist. The list has been refreshed.
menus.reorderMixedScopes: Items in a reorder must belong to the same parent.
menus.reorderConflict: Another change to this menu group happened at the same time. The list has been refreshed.
menus.reorderPickup: {{name}} picked up. Use arrow keys to move.
menus.routePathHelp: Start with "/" for a page inside this app, or "https://" for an external link (opens in a new tab).
menus.routePathInvalid: Enter an internal path starting with "/" or a full http(s):// URL.
menus.routePathClearsBinding: Saving a route path will remove the existing Designer binding from this menu item.
menus.noBinding: No binding exists on this menu item
menus.repeaterCycle: This Designer version cannot be bound — it contains a circular Repeater reference.
menus.invalidPgType: A field has an invalid PostgreSQL type. Open the designer and fix the field type.
menus.bindingDiffOrphaned: Orphaned columns (in DB but not in new version)
menus.invalidTargetVersion: Target version must be a positive number.
menus.parentHelp: Choose a top-level menu to make this a sub-menu. Leave as (top-level) to create a top-level menu. Max depth is 2.
menus.isSubMenuNote: This is a sub-menu under "{{parent}}". Sub-menus cannot have their own sub-menus (max depth 2).
menus.noPublishedVersions: This designer has no published versions. Publish one first to bind it.

drift.title: Schema Drift
drift.subtitle: Orphaned columns exist in the database but are not in the current Designer schema.
drift.noOrphans: No orphaned columns. Schema is clean.
drift.confirmBody: This will permanently delete all data in this column
drift.columnNotOrphaned: This column is part of the current Designer schema and cannot be dropped.

audit.title: Schema Audit Log
audit.subtitle: All DDL operations applied to this designer's provisioned table, newest first.

audit.title: Mutation Audit Log
audit.subtitle: All record-level mutations applied to this dynamic table, newest first.

datasets.title: Dataset Manager
datasets.subtitle: Create and manage custom datasets for reporting
datasets.noDatasetsCta: Create your first dataset to get started.
datasets.queryBuilderOpenHint: Build this dataset's query visually on its own page.
datasets.queryBuilderSaveFirst: Save the dataset first, then open it to build your query in the visual Query Builder.
datasets.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently drop the associated database view.
datasets.nameConflict: A dataset with this name already exists.
datasets.invalidQuery: The query could not be applied. It must be a single read-only SELECT, and every referenced table and column must exist.
datasets.concurrencyConflict: This dataset was modified by someone else. Reload to see the latest version.
datasets.builderStateInvalid: The query builder configuration is invalid. Please review your column selections and filter conditions.

constraints.title: Unique Constraints
constraints.subtitle: Add or remove UNIQUE constraints on the columns of provisioned CRUD tables.
constraints.designerSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, table, or menu…
constraints.noDesigners: No CRUD components are bound to a menu yet. Bind one to a menu to provision its table, then return here.
constraints.loadDetailError: Failed to load columns and constraints for this component.
constraints.addHint: Select one column for a single-column unique, or several columns for a composite unique constraint.
constraints.noColumns: This table has no user-defined columns to constrain.
constraints.noConstraints: No unique constraints on this table yet.
constraints.dropConfirmDescription: This removes the UNIQUE constraint "{{name}}" on ({{columns}}). Existing rows are kept, but duplicate values will be allowed afterwards.
constraints.errorTooManyColumns: Too many columns for a single constraint.
constraints.errorDuplicateColumns: The same column was selected more than once.
constraints.errorInvalidColumn: One of the selected columns is not a valid column.
constraints.errorColumnNotFound: One of the selected columns no longer exists on this table.
constraints.errorAlreadyExists: A unique constraint already covers these columns.
constraints.errorDuplicateValues: Existing rows contain duplicate values for the selected column(s), so the constraint cannot be created. Remove the duplicates first.
constraints.errorNotUnique: This constraint is not a unique constraint and cannot be dropped here.

tableProvisioning.title: Table Provisioning
tableProvisioning.subtitle: Provision the database table for a CRUD component directly, without binding it to a menu item.
tableProvisioning.noDesigners: No CRUD components exist yet. Create one in the Component Library first.
tableProvisioning.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or component id…
tableProvisioning.resyncConfirmDescription: This runs ALTER TABLE on the existing table "{{table}}" to add any new columns from v{{version}}. Existing data and columns are kept — nothing is dropped.

errors.notCrud: This is a VIEW-mode component and has no table to provision.
errors.versionNotFound: That version no longer exists for this component.
errors.versionNotPublished: Only a Published version can be provisioned.
errors.unsafeIdentifier: This component id cannot be used as a table name.
errors.repeaterCycle: The repeater references form a cycle and cannot be provisioned.
errors.invalidPgType: A field has an invalid column type. Fix it in the designer and republish.

dataset.chartNotConfigured: Set a category (and value) column to chart this dataset.
dataset.noViewEnabled: Enable Table view to show data.

datasets.nameConflict: A dataset with this name already exists.
datasets.concurrencyConflict: This dataset was modified by someone else. Reload to see the latest version.
datasets.builderStateInvalid: The query builder configuration is invalid. Please review your column selections and filter conditions.
datasets.previewTimeout: Preview query exceeded the time limit. Simplify the query or add filters.

validation.tooLong: Dataset name must be 63 characters or fewer.
validation.invalidPattern: Use lowercase letters (a-z), digits (0-9), and underscores (_). Must start with a letter or underscore.
validation.reservedKeyword: This is a reserved PostgreSQL keyword.
validation.denylist: This name is reserved for internal use.

sqlTextarea.label: SQL Query
sqlTextarea.placeholder:
SELECT id, name
FROM my_table
WHERE …
sqlTextarea.emptyHint: A SELECT statement is required in Custom Query mode.

audit.title: Dataset Audit Log
audit.subtitle: All CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE events for Datasets

palette.title: Tables
palette.columnsLoadError: Failed to load the table's columns. Please try again.

node.aliasInvalidPattern: Use lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; must start with a letter or underscore (max 63 chars).

validation.noLeftTable: Designate one table as the left (FROM) table.
validation.caseColumnRequiresAlias: A custom alias is required for every CASE column.
validation.calculatedColumnRequiresAlias: A custom alias is required for every calculated column.

caseEditor.title: CASE Column
caseEditor.elseValuePlaceholder: Value or leave blank for no ELSE

filterDialog.title: Filter Conditions
filterDialog.emptyGroup: No conditions yet. Click Add to start.

orderByPanel.title: Order By
orderByPanel.emptyState: No ORDER BY clauses. Click + Add Clause to start.

designers.fieldKeyInvalid: Some field keys are invalid. Review the highlighted errors and try again.
designers.versionConflict: Another save happened while you were editing. Reload the page and try again.
designers.designerExists: A designer with this ID already exists.
designers.identifierReservedKeyword: This name is a reserved PostgreSQL keyword. Choose a different name.
designers.publishConflict: A concurrent publish occurred. Reload and try again.
designers.versionNotPublished: Only Published versions can be bound.
designers.statusInvalid: Draft isn't a valid target status. Choose Published or Archived.
designers.duplicateConflict: Too many copies of this designer exist. Rename one and try again.
designers.duplicateIdTooLong: Designer ID is too long to duplicate. Rename it first.
designers.viewReferenceRejected: A VIEW-mode component cannot be used as a data source.
designers.authFilterFieldKeyInvalid: The selected field is not part of this designer version.
designers.datasetBindingInvalid: The selected dataset does not exist.

library.title: Component Library
library.subtitle: Design and manage versioned data-entry form schemas.
library.newVersionError: Could not create version. Fix any field key errors first.
library.publishError: Could not publish version. Reload and try again.
library.archiveError: Could not archive version. Reload and try again.
library.designerIdConflict: A designer with this ID already exists.
library.modeCRUDDesc: Provisions a table; supports full data entry
library.modeVIEWDesc: Display-only; no table or data entry
library.authFilterDescription: Pick the field that holds the owning user. The record list will only show rows where that field equals the current user, and the field is hidden on the form. Leave as “No filter” to disable.
library.authFilterLoadError: Could not load this version's fields.
library.authFilterError: Could not update auth filter. Try again.
library.datasetDescription:
Bind this version to a dataset. When set, the record list, filtering, sorting and export all read from the dataset instead of this component's own table.

Convention: the dataset must expose one column per fieldKey on this version (same names), plus the record id as “{{idColumn}}” — that id is required to open, update or delete a row. Leave as “No dataset” to use this component's own table.
library.datasetLoadError: Could not load the dataset list.
library.datasetError: Could not update the dataset binding. Try again.

toolbar.structuralHint: Layout containers — drag onto the canvas to start a section.

canvas.title: Designer
canvas.saveBlockedFieldKey: Fix the following field key errors before saving:
canvas.emptyCanvas: Drag a Stack, Row, Tabs, or Repeater container here to begin building.
canvas.dragFieldsToRowTemplate: Drag fields here to build the row template
canvas.dragFieldsToNodeTemplate: Drag fields here to build the tree node template
canvas.tabularDisplayBanner: Tabular display is on — each Repeater Field below becomes a column at runtime. Open Preview to see the table.
canvas.datasetDropFilterInputs: Drag input fields here to build the filter form
canvas.datasetNoViewPlaceholder: Enable Table view or a chart to show data at runtime

inspector.title: Properties
inspector.noSelection: Select an element to edit its properties.
inspector.setColumnsHint: Unchecked columns are hidden. Leave the header blank to use the column name.
inspector.fieldKeyInvalid: Must start with a letter or underscore, use only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores, and be at most 63 characters.
inspector.selectElementHint: Select an element to configure its properties.

placeholders.label: e.g. Upload your file
placeholders.fieldNameNoSource: Set the Repeater's Row form first

help.datasetFilterable: Drag input fields into the component on the canvas, then bind each condition's value to one of their field keys.
help.datasetNoConditions: No conditions yet — add one to filter the dataset.
help.chartValue: The numeric column to aggregate. Ignored for Count.
help.authFilterColumn: Optional. Scopes every view to rows whose value in this column equals the current user. Pick the column that holds the user id; leave as “No filter” to show all rows.
help.styleClasses: Tailwind / utility class names appended to the rendered element.
help.hideWhenAll: Comma-separated field key names. Element is hidden only when every listed field has a value.
help.hideWhenAny: Comma-separated field key names. Element is hidden when any listed field has a value. Missing or already-hidden references are treated as "no value".
help.rowFormComponent: The component rendered inside the Add/Edit modal. When empty, the +Add button stays disabled.
help.rowFormVersion: Pick which published version of the component this Repeater binds to. A component can have several published versions.
help.repeaterFieldKey: Names the one-to-many relation to the row-form records.
help.dependsOn: Comma-separated field key names. Dropdown is disabled until all listed fields have a non-empty value.
help.dropdownValueField: The column whose value the form stores (often the record ID).
help.dropdownDependsOn: Cascade filter: comma-separated localField:targetColumn pairs. Options are filtered where each targetColumn equals the form's localField value; the dropdown waits until those fields are set.
help.apiPath: Relative path under the platform API. Example: /factories or /factories/{factoryId}/production-units
help.fieldName: The form data key whose value this field displays. Inside a Repeater row template, this reads the row's value at fieldName; placed elsewhere on a form it reads the surrounding form's formData[fieldName].
help.headerName: Column header rendered above this field in the Repeater's table view. Falls back to fieldName when blank.
help.inlineStyle: CSS declarations separated by semicolons. Either kebab-case (font-size) or camelCase works.
help.imageSource: Object key (e.g. designer/factory-logos/abc.png) or absolute URL (https://..., data:, blob:)
help.rawHtml: Markup rendered verbatim into the canvas and the data-entry view. Authored by trusted designers — no sanitization is applied.
help.fileAccept: Comma-separated MIME types or file extensions — e.g. image/* or .pdf,.doc. Leave blank to allow any file.
help.minMaxRowsError: Max rows ({{max}}) is less than Min rows ({{min}}). End-users will not be able to satisfy the minimum because Add disables at the maximum.
help.showInTable: Show this field as a column in the menu's record-list table.
help.columnHeader: Header text for this column in the record-list table. Falls back to the humanized field key when blank.
help.columnOrder: Ascending position of this column in the record-list table. Lower numbers appear first; ties keep canvas order.
help.showInTableDropdownDesigner: Shows the referenced record's label (not the stored id).
help.showInTableRepeater: Shows the count of child rows.
help.singleRecordSource: The CRUD designer whose form is rendered. Only CRUD designers (which provision a table) are listed.
help.singleRecordAuthFilterColumn: Required. The column that owns the record per user — it is stamped with the current user on the server and hidden on the form. Each user reads/edits only their own single record scoped by this column.
help.treeViewFieldKey: In view/select mode, the selected node ids are stored here (comma-separated) on the host form's record.
help.treeViewPageSize: How many child nodes load per page when expanding a node. A search box and pager appear when a level has more.
help.treeViewMutualExclusion: Create/Edit/Delete and multi-select are mutually exclusive — turning one on clears the other.
help.treeViewViewMode: Read-only browse. Disables add/edit/delete AND selection — users can only expand and search the tree.
help.treeViewSelectAll: Checking a node also selects its entire subtree (all descendants).
help.treeViewAuthFilterColumn: Optional. The node-template column that owns each record per user — stamped with the current user on the server and hidden on the form. Each user reads/edits only their own nodes scoped by this column.

singleRecord.notConfigured: Select a data source, version, and auth filter column to configure this component.

renderer.fileUploadError: File upload failed for '{{field}}'. Please try again.
renderer.dropFieldsToTableHelp: Drop one or more Repeater Field elements into the template to define columns.
renderer.configureRowTemplate: Configure the row template by dragging fields into this Repeater on the canvas

repeaterDrawer.noDesigner: No row designer configured for this Repeater.

treeView.confirmDelete: Delete this node and all of its descendants?

keyboard.pickedUp: Picked up {{type}}. Tab to a drop target then press Space or Enter to drop, or Escape to cancel.

errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.badRequest: The request is missing required information.
errors.invalidRequestBody: The request body is missing, empty, or malformed.

entry.deleteConfirmDescription: This record will be soft-deleted. You can restore it from the admin audit view.
entry.noRecordsMatchFilter: No records match the current filter.
entry.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to create records here.
